Name: Finalize design token schema and naming
Notes: Define and lock the design-tokens.json structure (colors, typography, spacing, radii, elevation) and naming conventions. Ensure compatibility with CSS variables and component usage.

Name: Wire tokens into CSS and provide base variables
Notes: Bind design tokens to CSS custom properties and ensure global.css consumes tokens for theming.

Name: Core Button component
Notes: Implement Button.tsx with props: label, onClick, variant ('primary'|'secondary'), disabled; consume tokens; accessible label.

Name: Core Input component
Notes: Implement Input.tsx with placeholder, value, onChange, type, and aria-label; consume tokens.

Name: Core Card component
Notes: Implement Card.tsx with optional title and content area; accessible semantics.

Name: Core Nav component
Notes: Implement Nav.tsx with a simple horizontal list of items; keyboard-friendly.

Name: Onboarding flow integration
Notes: Implement Onboarding flow using Button, Input, Card; collect a name and a simple action on Continue.

Name: Storybook setup for revamp-ui
Notes: Initialize Storybook for revamp-ui; create stories for Button, Input, Card, Nav, Onboarding; connect tokens.

Name: Handoff pipeline documentation
Notes: Document design-to-code mapping, component library contracts, and visual diff checks.

Name: Phase 0 sprint kickoff plan
Notes: Publish Phase 0 sprint plan with cadence, ceremonies, and win conditions.

Name: Design Systems Council governance doc
Notes: Create governance cadence, artifacts, and migration plan for tokens/components.

Name: UX Research onboarding usability test plan
Notes: Recruit participants and run 1 usability test on onboarding flow; capture feedback.

Name: Accessibility baseline for new flows
Notes: Define WCAG targets; ensure keyboard navigation and focus order for onboarding and core components.

Name: Metrics plan for Phase 0
Notes: Define task time, task success rate, error rate, and adoption KPIs; define data collection method.

Name: Migration plan (Phase 0) for token-based system
Notes: Draft a high-level migration path from old UI to token-based system; include risk and rollback notes.

Name: Phase 0 demo readiness
Notes: Prepare a 1–2 screen demo combining onboarding flow with Token-driven UI kit for leadership demo.
